query:
-- Properties table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS properties (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  houseId INT,
  entityId INT,
  propertyName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  propertyCode VARCHAR(50),
  streetAddress VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  unit VARCHAR(50),
  city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  zipCode VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  county VARCHAR(100),
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'USA',
  propertyType ENUM('single_family', 'multi_family', 'condo', 'townhouse', 'commercial', 'industrial', 'land', 'mixed_use', 'other') NOT NULL,
  propertySubType VARCHAR(100),
  yearBuilt INT,
  squareFootage INT,
  lotSize DECIMAL(10,2),
  bedrooms INT,
  bathrooms DECIMAL(3,1),
  stories INT,
  garageSpaces INT,
  status ENUM('active', 'vacant', 'under_renovation', 'for_sale', 'for_rent', 'pending_acquisition', 'sold', 'archived') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  occupancyStatus ENUM('owner_occupied', 'tenant_occupied', 'vacant', 'under_construction') DEFAULT 'vacant',
  purchasePrice DECIMAL(15,2),
  purchaseDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  currentValue DECIMAL(15,2),
  lastValuationDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  hasMortgage BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  mortgageBalance DECIMAL(15,2),
  mortgagePayment DECIMAL(10,2),
  mortgageLender VARCHAR(255),
  mortgageInterestRate DECIMAL(5,3),
  mortgageMaturityDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  insuranceProvider VARCHAR(255),
  insurancePolicyNumber VARCHAR(100),
  insurancePremium DECIMAL(10,2),
  insuranceRenewalDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  parcelNumber VARCHAR(100),
  annualPropertyTax DECIMAL(10,2),
  taxAssessedValue DECIMAL(15,2),
  deedType VARCHAR(100),
  titleCompany VARCHAR(255),
  zoningClassification VARCHAR(100),
  description TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  tags JSON,
  primaryPhotoUrl TEXT,
  photoUrls JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Projects table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_projects (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  projectName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  projectCode VARCHAR(50),
  projectType ENUM('renovation', 'repair', 'maintenance', 'improvement', 'addition', 'landscaping', 'inspection', 'compliance', 'other') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  scope TEXT,
  objectives TEXT,
  status ENUM('planning', 'approved', 'in_progress', 'on_hold', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'planning' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'medium',
  plannedStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  plannedEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  actualStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  actualEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  estimatedBudget DECIMAL(15,2),
  approvedBudget DECIMAL(15,2),
  actualCost DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  contingencyAmount DECIMAL(15,2),
  percentComplete INT DEFAULT 0,
  primaryContractorId INT,
  contractorName VARCHAR(255),
  contractorContact VARCHAR(255),
  contractNumber VARCHAR(100),
  requiresPermit BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  permitNumber VARCHAR(100),
  permitStatus ENUM('not_required', 'pending', 'approved', 'denied', 'expired') DEFAULT 'not_required',
  permitDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvalDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  grantId INT,
  fundingSourceId INT,
  chargeCodeId INT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Project Milestones table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_project_milestones (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  milestoneName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  targetDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'delayed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  dependsOnMilestoneId INT,
  deliverables TEXT,
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Project Tasks table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_project_tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  milestoneId INT,
  parentTaskId INT,
  taskName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  assignedToId INT,
  assignedToName VARCHAR(255),
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  estimatedHours DECIMAL(8,2),
  actualHours DECIMAL(8,2),
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'blocked', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'not_started' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'medium',
  estimatedCost DECIMAL(10,2),
  actualCost DECIMAL(10,2),
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Project Expenses table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_project_expenses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  taskId INT,
  expenseDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('labor', 'materials', 'equipment', 'permits', 'inspection', 'subcontractor', 'supplies', 'travel', 'other') NOT NULL,
  description VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  vendorName VARCHAR(255),
  vendorId INT,
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(100),
  amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  taxAmount DECIMAL(10,2),
  totalAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'paid', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(100),
  checkNumber VARCHAR(50),
  approvedBy INT,
  approvalDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  receiptUrl TEXT,
  attachmentUrls JSON,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Financials table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_financials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  year INT NOT NULL,
  month INT NOT NULL,
  rentalIncome DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  otherIncome DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  totalIncome DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  mortgagePayment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  propertyTax DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  insurance DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  utilities DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  maintenance DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  repairs DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  managementFees DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  hoaFees DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  landscaping DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  otherExpenses DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  totalExpenses DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  netOperatingIncome DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  cashFlow DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Documents table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  projectId INT,
  documentName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('deed', 'title', 'survey', 'appraisal', 'inspection', 'insurance', 'tax', 'lease', 'contract', 'permit', 'photo', 'floor_plan', 'receipt', 'invoice', 'other') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(255),
  fileSize INT,
  mimeType VARCHAR(100),
  documentDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expirationDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  tags JSON,
  isConfidential BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  uploadedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Tenants table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_tenants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  tenantType ENUM('individual', 'family', 'business') DEFAULT 'individual',
  firstName VARCHAR(100),
  lastName VARCHAR(100),
  businessName VARCHAR(255),
  email VARCHAR(255),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  leaseStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  leaseEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  monthlyRent DECIMAL(10,2),
  securityDeposit DECIMAL(10,2),
  leaseType ENUM('month_to_month', 'annual', 'multi_year') DEFAULT 'annual',
  status ENUM('active', 'pending', 'past', 'evicted') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  moveInDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  moveOutDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  emergencyContactName VARCHAR(255),
  emergencyContactPhone VARCHAR(50),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Inspections table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_inspections (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  projectId INT,
  inspectionType ENUM('move_in', 'move_out', 'annual', 'quarterly', 'maintenance', 'safety', 'code_compliance', 'appraisal', 'other') NOT NULL,
  inspectionDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  inspectorName VARCHAR(255),
  inspectorCompany VARCHAR(255),
  inspectorLicense VARCHAR(100),
  overallCondition ENUM('excellent', 'good', 'fair', 'poor', 'critical'),
  passedInspection BOOLEAN,
  findings TEXT,
  recommendations TEXT,
  requiredRepairs TEXT,
  estimatedRepairCost DECIMAL(15,2),
  followUpRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  followUpDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  followUpNotes TEXT,
  reportUrl TEXT,
  photoUrls JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Maintenance Logs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_maintenance_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  projectId INT,
  inspectionId INT,
  maintenanceType ENUM('preventive', 'corrective', 'emergency', 'routine', 'upgrade') NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('plumbing', 'electrical', 'hvac', 'roofing', 'flooring', 'appliances', 'exterior', 'interior', 'landscaping', 'pest_control', 'cleaning', 'safety', 'other') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  reportedDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  scheduledDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('reported', 'scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'reported' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'emergency') DEFAULT 'medium',
  serviceProviderName VARCHAR(255),
  serviceProviderPhone VARCHAR(50),
  estimatedCost DECIMAL(10,2),
  actualCost DECIMAL(10,2),
  resolution TEXT,
  partsReplaced TEXT,
  warrantyInfo TEXT,
  beforePhotoUrls JSON,
  afterPhotoUrls JSON,
  reportedBy VARCHAR(255),
  completedBy VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Vendors table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_vendors (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vendorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  vendorType ENUM('contractor', 'plumber', 'electrician', 'hvac', 'landscaper', 'cleaner', 'property_manager', 'inspector', 'appraiser', 'insurance', 'legal', 'other') NOT NULL,
  contactName VARCHAR(255),
  email VARCHAR(255),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  website VARCHAR(255),
  address TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zipCode VARCHAR(20),
  licenseNumber VARCHAR(100),
  insuranceInfo TEXT,
  taxId VARCHAR(50),
  rating INT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'blacklisted') DEFAULT 'active',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Utilities table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_utilities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  utilityType ENUM('electric', 'gas', 'water', 'sewer', 'trash', 'internet', 'cable', 'phone', 'solar', 'other') NOT NULL,
  providerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  accountNumber VARCHAR(100),
  providerPhone VARCHAR(50),
  providerWebsite VARCHAR(255),
  billingDay INT,
  averageMonthlyBill DECIMAL(10,2),
  paidBy ENUM('owner', 'tenant', 'split') DEFAULT 'owner',
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'transferred') DEFAULT 'active',
  meterNumber VARCHAR(100),
  meterLocation VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  vendorName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,

  taxId VARCHAR(50),
  rating INT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'blacklisted') DEFAULT 'active',
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Property Utilities table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_utilities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  utilityType ENUM('electric', 'gas', 'water', 'sewer', 'trash', 'internet', 'cable', 'phone', 'solar', 'other') NOT NULL,
  providerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  accountNumber VARCHAR(100),
  providerPhone VARCHAR(50),
  providerWebsite VARCHAR(255),
  billingDay INT,
  averageMonthlyBill DECIMAL(10,2),
  paidBy ENUM('owner', 'tenant', 'split') DEFAULT 'owner',
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'transferred') DEFAULT 'active',
  meterNumber VARCHAR(100),
  meterLocation VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
